methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
ADASI is a sovereign-funded defense and security company at the EDGE stage, backed by the EDGE Group. The relevant peer universe comprises 10 comparables: two publicly listed firms (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and eight private companies including Anduril Industries, Scale AI, Saronic, Flock Safety, and Shield AI. This represents the broader defense and security sector; however, the peer set lacks sufficient depth at ADASI's specific stage and valuation tier.

Peer-median methodology is not applicable here. A search for same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables in Defense & Security yielded zero qualifying datapoints; the sector contains 21 total peers, but filtering by stage proximity and valuation tier produced insufficient matches (fewer than three required anchors). Attempting to rely on all-sector median figures would introduce material distortion and is therefore rejected.

The absence of tight peer comparables at ADASI's stage and tier—combined with its sovereign-funding structure and specialized EDGE Group backing—limits traditional triangulation. A robust valuation would require alternative methods such as discounted cash flow analysis (if financial projections are available), precedent transaction analysis in defense tech M&A, or explicit reference to sovereign funding benchmarks and government procurement value frameworks. Key uncertainties include ADASI's revenue scale, growth trajectory, and the specific technical differentiation relative to named private peers. Further data on financial performance and strategic positioning is necessary to establish a defensible range.
